title: agropyron sylvaticum
intro: Agropyron sylvaticum, also known as meadow barley, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of meadow barley include its ability to support digestive health and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the management of diabetes and cardiovascular disease. Meadow barley can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in herbal remedies.
